releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Changelog

🎉 Reworked the entire plugin settings panel!
It should be largely more understanding now.
No more strange list, multiple modal, scrolling intensifies to find file… 

Feat:
- New settings, with path finding 
- New modal to edit *all* canvas settings, adding and remove classes and change the opening type
- Adding the new modals as a command and link a button in the page header to it!

Aka : One button to manage everything!
